settings.heading: Our services
settings.intro: More than a store — support that helps you buy right and stay running.

settings.title: Buying guidance
settings.text: Not sure which model fits? Tell us your needs and budget and we'll point you to the right product.

settings.title: Setup & compatibility
settings.text: Clear specs and compatibility help so your new tech works out of the box.

settings.title: Warranty support
settings.text: We help you understand coverage and make claims simple if something goes wrong.

settings.title: Returns & exchanges
settings.text: Changed your mind? Our return process is straightforward and fair.

settings.title: Order tracking
settings.text: Track every order from dispatch to doorstep, with help if anything stalls.

settings.title: Secure shopping
settings.text: Encrypted checkout and trusted payment options on every order.

settings.heading: Have a question first?
settings.content: Our team is happy to help you choose, set up, or support your tech.
